reset_biology_synthesis.recommendation: Hunter Williams (newer, 2026-06-17): "Do two to three times per year that cycle of 30 days, one to two milligrams of Prostomax and Desolute, both per day." [may-2026-qa-retatrutide-testosterone-autoimmune-and-beyond--ea9ba352 @ 46:38, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/may-2026-qa-retatrutide-testosterone-autoimmune-and-beyond--ea9ba352/] Hunter Williams (older, 2026-03-29): "In cases of more severe BPH, you're going to want to err on like the two milligrams a day and do that for 30 days. Some people will say like 10 to 30, I like 30 to 60 days."
